name: Primary Land Use Tax Lot Output (PLUTO) — NYC Open Data tabular (SODA)

authentication.recommended: Socrata application token via X-App-Token header (preferred) or $$app_token parameter

rate_limits.without_token: throttled by IP address in a shared common pool
rate_limits.with_token: not throttled unless requests are determined abusive or malicious; no numeric published limit

update_frequency: Major release quarterly (all fields); minor release monthly (zoning attributes only: ZoneDist1-4, Overlay1-2, SPDist1-3, LtdHeight, SplitZone, ResidFAR, CommFAR, FacilFAR, ZoneMap, ZMCode, TaxMap, EDesigNum) per official README 26v1 (E4). Propagation lag of minor releases to the SODA channel unobserved (OQ-6).
geographic_coverage: All five NYC boroughs, tax-lot level; one record per condominium complex (billing BBL), not per condo unit lot; Marble Hill legally Manhattan/serviced by Bronx and Rikers legally Bronx/serviced by Queens (E4)

fields_available.note: 73 fields observed verbatim on a live SODA record 2026-07-16 (E2); SODA omits null fields per record, so this is a floor. Full column set pending api/views columns-array enumeration (OQ-2). Fields below marked 'dictionary-known' are documented in the README (E4) but were absent from the sampled record.
fields_available.units_and_null_conventions: PENDING data-dictionary extraction (OQ-5). Verified so far: NumFloors shows null for zero and values below one (E4 verbatim).

terms_usage_notes: DCP disclaimer (README 26v1, E4): provided for informational purposes only; DCP does not warranty completeness, accuracy, content, or fitness for any particular purpose or use. NYC Open Data portal terms for automated access not yet captured (OQ-8).
connector_implementation: PLAN ONLY (no connector built in M1-T001): per-BBL/per-block SODA queries with X-App-Token from secrets; raw record + version field + retrieval timestamp persisted to raw_source_records/property_source_facts; schema-drift check against api/views columns array each scheduled run; freshness monitor polls the version field, not Socrata metadata timestamps.
latest_source_version: 26v1 — observed in the version field of a live SODA record on 2026-07-16 (E2); matches DCP README header 'May 2026 (26v1)' (E4)
known_limitations: SODA omits null fields per record; schema must come from the columns array/data dictionary, never from record keys (E2)
One record per condominium complex under the billing BBL; condo-unit BBLs will not match directly (E4)
Underlying input vintages lag the release date; see DATES OF DATA table in README 26v1 (E4)
PLUTO 26v1 built on Geosupport 26A while Geosupport 26B is current — cross-source version skew (E4 vs M0-T002 report)
Socrata metadata timestamps for this dataset are suspect (future-dated summarizer readings, OQ-1); do not use for freshness monitoring until re-verified
Field-level units and null/placeholder conventions not yet extracted from the data dictionary (OQ-5)
fallback_source: DCP bulk CSV release via BYTES of the BIG APPLE (archive of prior versions; exact URLs pending G1 re-verification, OQ-4); processed on a Render worker only, per the low-storage policy
open_questions: OQ-1: raw Socrata createdAt/rowsUpdatedAt/publicationDate values for 64uk-42ks
OQ-2: full SODA column list from the api/views columns array

OQ-5: field-level units and null conventions from pluto_datadictionary.pdf (incl. area/frontage units, assessment currency basis, xcoord/ycoord CRS/EPSG, code lists, README-name to SODA-column mapping)
OQ-6: minor-release (26v1.1, ...) propagation and lag on the SODA channel
OQ-8: NYC Open Data portal terms of use for automated access

name: MapPLUTO — tax-lot geometry with PLUTO attributes (DCP bulk GIS release)
api_dataset_identifier: f888-ni5f (NYC Open Data catalog entry; href/external-pointer type only — NOT a tabular SODA resource; E3)

authentication.notes: Public download per DCP release model; nyc.gov returned HTTP 403 to the non-browser evidence session (bot protection), so download mechanics need G1 re-verification (OQ-4)

update_frequency: Quarterly (major releases; E3 portal metadata 'Quarterly' and E4 README release model). PLUTOChangeFile<ver>.csv ships as part of the MapPLUTO download (E4).
geographic_coverage: All five NYC boroughs, tax-lot polygon level; shoreline-clipped primary variant, water-included unclipped variant reported (E6, NEEDS G1 RE-VERIFICATION)

fields_available.note: PLUTO attribute set (see nyc-dcp-pluto-soda record) merged with tax-lot polygon features from the DCP-modified DOF Digital Tax Map, clipped to shoreline (E3/E4 verbatim descriptions). Exact geometry-side fields/CRS pending first capture of the FileGDB metadata (OQ-10).

terms_usage_notes: Same DCP informational-purposes-only disclaimer as PLUTO (README 26v1, E4). Formats reported: ESRI File Geodatabase and shapefile; clipped (Mappluto.gdb) and unclipped (Mapplutounclipped.gdb) variants; borough shapefile distribution — all format details from search evidence, NEEDS G1 RE-VERIFICATION (E6/OQ-10).
connector_implementation: PLAN ONLY: quarterly Render worker job streams the shoreline-clipped FileGDB into bounded temp space, loads PostGIS tax_lot_geometries, uploads the original archive to Supabase Storage (gis-imports), deletes temp files (low-storage policy). Version pinned from release file name + README. Never executed on the owner's PC.
latest_source_version: 26v1 per DCP README (E4). The f888-ni5f portal entry carries STALE 22v3 documentation attachments and frozen 2013 timestamps (E3) — version currency must be read from the DCP channel, not the portal.
known_limitations: No tabular SODA resource exists for MapPLUTO; f888-ni5f is an href pointer only (E3)
Portal attachment channel lags DCP by years (22v3 dictionaries on a 26v1 product) — cross-channel discrepancy recorded for S4 (E3 vs E4/E5)
Socrata timestamps frozen at 2013-07-25 for href datasets; unusable for freshness monitoring (E3)
Exact download URLs, file sizes, archive URLs unverified (nyc.gov 403 to evidence session; OQ-4)
ArcGIS feature-service endpoint unverified (JS-rendered Hub page; OQ-3)
Same condo billing-BBL and borough-idiosyncrasy semantics as PLUTO (E4)
fallback_source: Candidate: official ArcGIS feature service (hub.arcgis.com/datasets/DCP::mappluto-1/about) — UNVERIFIED, must not be used until the REST endpoint is confirmed (OQ-3). The NYC Open Data f888-ni5f entry is a catalog pointer only, not a data fallback.
open_questions: OQ-3: official ArcGIS feature-service REST endpoint for MapPLUTO
OQ-4: exact bulk download URLs, file sizes, and BYTES of the BIG APPLE archive URLs
OQ-9: target URL of the f888-ni5f href entry
OQ-10: clipped/unclipped exact file names, borough-shapefile availability, geometry CRS, meta_mappluto.pdf contents
OQ-11: PLUTOChangeFile<ver>.csv exact location and format
